title: salix × montana
intro: Salix × montana, also known as Montane Willow, is a hybrid willow plant that is a cross between the Salix alba and Salix fragilis species. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Salix × montana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infection. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to fever and pain management.
